To: Aditya Rao <aditya.rao@redwood.com>
Date: Thu, 22 Apr 2027 09:13:00 -0700
Subject: Audit logs / retention controls question

Hi Aditya,

Thanks for the demo yesterday — the team liked the latency profile and the model options. Before we route this to procurement we need a clearer picture on two items that are gating our SOC/Procurement review:

1) Per-region retention controls: We need the ability to set retention policies scoped to a customer and region (e.g., EU logs retained 90 days, US logs 365 days) and to ensure logs for EU workloads never leave EU storage.

2) Audit export with PII hashing: Our auditor asks that any exported audit trail be PII-masked (SHA-256 or equivalent) and include a verifiable export record (who exported, when, what filters were applied).

Can Redwood support a scoped export with hashed PII and region scoping, or do...

Thomas — thanks for taking the call earlier. Quick recap from our side so we’re aligned and can move to proposal: 

What you stated as the main pain points:
- Frequent latency spikes during peak inference windows (even with smaller batch sizes) impacting SLA to clinicians.
- Need strong tenant isolation for PHI workflows (multi-tenant model serving today but want dedicated pool).
- On-prem-ish networking requirement: VPC peering + BYOK for KMS; audit logs & retention for 12 months.

Goals you asked us to hit:
- P95 latency target: <= 120ms for 512-token requests in steady-state.
- Baseline throughput: ~300 requests/m...
